title: Secure Coding 101_ JavaScript

Secure Coding 101_ JavaScript

VSCode Shortcuts

Fold All Functions

`ctrl+a` `ctrl+k` `ctrl+0`

Find All References

alt+shift+F12,

Comment out

ctrl+/,

Open Terminal

```ctrl+` ```

Find Closing Bracket

ctrl+shift+\

Firefox Shortcuts

Show Source

ctrl+u

Show Console

ctrl+shift+k

Show Debugger

ctrl+shift+c
